Lepidaploa xiquexiquensis is a part of the larger group of plants known as angiosperms. The plant is further classified as a member of the subfamily Vernonioideae. Lepidaploa xiquexiquensis is a relatively newly discovered species, adding to the diversity of the plant kingdom.
